testcase.name: admin credits page › renders live credits data instead of placeholder rows

failure.message: credits-page.spec.ts:37:9 renders live credits data instead of placeholder rows

testcase.failure:
[chromium] › credits-page.spec.ts:37:9 › admin credits page › renders live credits data instead of placeholder rows
Error: expect(locator).toBeVisible() failed
Locator: getByText('North Star Deli') Expected: visible Timeout: 5000ms Error: element(s) not found
Call log: - Expect "toBeVisible" with timeout 5000ms - waiting for getByText('North Star Deli')
67 | await page.goto('/admin/credits'); 68 | > 69 | await expect(page.getByText('North Star Deli')).toBeVisible(); | ^ 70 | await expect(page.getByText('Riverfront Grill')).toBeVisible(); 71 | await expect(page.getByText('Beta signup bonus')).toBeVisible(); 72 | await expect(page.getByText('Downtown Bistro')).toHaveCount(0); at /Users/tuckerlee/Desktop/Projects/lunchlineup/apps/web/tests/e2e/credits-page.spec.ts:69:57
